prestazioni: RB25DET NEO (2.5L inline-6) forced-induction upgrade with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit (intake: 260° duration, 10.5mm lift; exhaust: 260° duration, 10.0mm lift) and HKS Hi-Power 800cc fuel injectors for 450whp on E85 fuel

Custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo (equal-length 4-2-1 headers, 200-cell catalytic converter, and a 3.5-inch straight-pipe section with a Burns Stainless muffler for optimal scavenging and RB25DET-specific backpressure tuning)

Nismo 555X coilover suspension with 8kg/mm front springs, 7kg/mm rear springs, and 30-way adjustable damping, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0114K) for C35-specific subframe reinforcement
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (C35-specific front fenders, rear quarter panels, and side skirts) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (15mm wider front, 20mm wider rear) to accommodate 9.5x17 ET+12 front and 10.5x17 ET+15 rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x11 +20 rear for track use)

Seibon Carbon fiber C35-specific hood (with integrated RB25DET heat extraction vents) and trunk lid (weight reduction: 8kg total), paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear diffuser and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (ABS plastic, 3mm thickness) with integrated canards (Rocket Bunny-style)

Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (JDM-spec, 7-point harness compatibility) with Bride Euroster II seat rails (C35-specific mounting points) and a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (deep-dish, 5mm thick suede grip) wrapped in Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses (red, FIA-approved)
